product: Databricks Assistant on the documentation site
tagline: The Databricks Assistant is now available on the Databricks documentation site to help you get answers and discover information about Databricks.
what_it_does: The Databricks Assistant is now available on the Databricks documentation site to help you get answers and discover information about Databricks. Databricks documentation provides how to guidance and reference information for data analysts, data scientists, and data engineers solving problems in analytics and AI. The Databricks Data Intelligence Platform enables data teams to collaborate on data stored in the Lakehouse.
why_it_matters: + Data warehousing + Query and analyze data using SQL, manage schemas, and optimize data warehouse performance.
